hyperedges.label: ECA Stage (Extract, Classify, Aggregate)
hyperedges.relation: compose Stage 1 of the pipeline

hyperedges.label: Context Intelligence Stage
hyperedges.relation: compose Stage 2 of the pipeline

hyperedges.label: Rule-Based Analysis Stage
hyperedges.relation: compose Stage 3 of the pipeline

hyperedges.label: BRD Composition & Validation Stage
hyperedges.relation: compose Stage 4 (composition, validation, export) of the pipeline

hyperedges.label: A.N.T. Architecture Layer
hyperedges.relation: implement the 3-layer A.N.T. pattern (Architecture, Navigation, Tools)

hyperedges.label: LLM Integration Points
hyperedges.relation: form the optional LLM enrichment subsystem

hyperedges.label: Sub-Extractor Group
hyperedges.relation: run in parallel to extract domain signals from content chunks

hyperedges.label: Data Contract System
hyperedges.relation: enforce typed data contracts across pipeline stages

hyperedges.label: Validation Subsystem
hyperedges.relation: provide quality gates at multiple pipeline stages

hyperedges.label: Project Documentation Corpus
hyperedges.relation: form the project's documentation and planning corpus
